title: Mandatory Optifine
description: A mod that tells players they need Optifine in a modpack
body: If you want to publish a modpack that needs optifine in it, since it isn't possible due to copyright, put this mod instead, it will make appear the text "Install Optifine" in the main menu. [CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/mandatory-optifine)
